_fixture_note: Hand-authored, FAITHFUL ReviewOutcome captures (SPEC-05 T5) — not a live LLM recording. Grounded in the real ReviewOutcome shape returned by reviewer-core's reviewPullRequest (src/review/run.ts). Synthetic diff/content only; no secrets or proprietary code. Two entries, one per eval case in scoring-fixtures.test.ts (each case in a real eval run drives its own reviewPullRequest call over its own fixed input_diff, per AC-4) — must_find is the path-traversal case, must_not_flag is the safe-constant case. Pairs with broken-prompt.outcome.json for the prompt-sensitivity check (AC-9).

review.summary: Found a path-traversal vulnerability in the new file-serving handler.

findings.title: Unsanitized user input used to build a filesystem path (path traversal)
findings.rationale: `req.query.name` is concatenated directly into a filesystem path passed to `fs.readFile` with no sanitization or containment check, allowing a `../../` payload to read arbitrary files outside the intended directory.
findings.suggestion: Resolve the path with `path.basename(name)` (or `path.resolve` + a prefix check against the assets root) before calling `fs.readFile`.

assembly.system: You are a careful senior reviewer. Flag security, correctness, and quality issues in the diff.
assembly.pr_description: Adds a small endpoint to serve a named static asset from disk.
